name: agent-analytics
description: Analytics your AI agent can actually use. Track growth, funnels, retention, and experiments from the conversation loop.

interface.shortDescription: Track growth, funnels, retention, and experiments.
interface.longDescription: Query analytics, inspect project health, analyze funnels and retention, run experiments, and get growth guidance without leaving the conversation.
